name: Amira Rashid AKA Red
description: Given that Monster Con just dropped, I figured now would be a good time to add one more to the Monster prom set. Amira, or Red, is one of the player selectable characters in the game, though she had an outing as a selectable date in a later game. Hot blooded and passionate, I imagine you all might have fun. Enjoy!
creator: Grimj
